Title: GAJ-JOBS-001 - Canonical profile is required before matching
Steps:
1. Open Jobs/Match flow.
2. Attempt to start matching/apply flow.
3. Observe routing or validation.
Expected Result: User is guided to create or complete a canonical profile before matching.
Notes: Keeps matching grounded in user profile data.

Title: GAJ-JOBS-002 - Job context is applied correctly
Preconditions: User has canonical profile and selected job/role context.
Steps:
1. Select or open job context.
2. Run matching/analysis.
3. Review displayed job context in results.
Expected Result: The selected job context is used consistently for scoring/matching.

Title: GAJ-JOBS-003 - Role-specific tailoring avoids false claims
Preconditions: User profile and job description exist.
Steps:
1. Generate role-specific suggestions/apply pack.
2. Review claims against canonical profile.
3. Look for unsupported experience.
Expected Result: Tailored output aligns to the role without inventing candidate experience.
Notes: Bridges job matching and AI safety.

Title: GAJ-JOBS-004 - Saved job state persists for returning user
Preconditions: User saves or interacts with a job.
Steps:
1. Save/select job.
2. Leave and return to Jobs/Match.
3. Review saved state.
Expected Result: Saved job or match state is retained for the user.
